recentTweets.text: RT @HouseDemocrats: John Lewis was more than our esteemed friend and colleague, he was a force to be reckoned with and a powerful civil rig…

Today, we remember and honor our dear friend, Congressman John Lewis. 

John was a civil rights icon and champion for the disenfranchised. He led the march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge and never let down the good fight throughout his time in Congress. 

We continue his legacy https://t.co/aYnf45uJzs

This is one of the most vile and disgusting things I’ve seen someone say on Fox — which is saying something.

Congress should empower states https://t.co/sjP1sGBVpn

Trump thinks $400 MILLION of YOUR tax dollars is “very little” to renovate his Qatari plane. 

That’s real money to Americans. It’s $400 million he took away from what could have paid for people’s rent, groceries, and gas, just to renovate a plane he didn’t need.

Fireworks in #Lynwood and a commemoration of the 50th anniversary of the Korean Friendship Bell in #SanPedro — a diverse and colorful #CA44 celebration of our nation’s 250th anniversary this weekend! Happy 4th! https://t.co/mecwB60Ztt

Today, as we celebrate 250 years of American independence, we rise up to say: NO KINGS. 

Our founding fathers fought for a democracy in which all are equal and tyrants are not allowed. Let’s recommit to that good fight. 

Happy Fourth of July! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/OwQmX9DXyu

Thank you to all of our postal workers, like Carrie in San Pedro!

Through every kind of weather, your dedication keeps families in #CA44 and across the country connected. Your commitment is a true lesson in service. Happy National Postal Worker Day! https://t.co/azdpGQBGIz

Immigrants have shaped every chapter of American success. 

So for Immigrant Heritage Month, let’s honor the immigrants who have helped build our country and recognize the pivotal role they play in our national story. 

#ImmigrantHeritageMonth https://t.co/accouNj2yw

SCOTUS confirmed what I believe is the foundation of who we are as a country:

If you are born in America, you are American. Simple as that. 

Trump just lost his fight but the fight is not over. Some of the Justices seem to think otherwise.

As hardworking Americans struggle to keep their heads above water on rent or mortgage payments, Trump actually believes housing costs aren’t high enough. 

Out of pocket and out of touch.

The ROAD to Housing Act is a step towards making sure housing is affordable for millions of Americans, as costs continue to skyrocket. 

Americans should be able to afford to put a roof over their heads. Trump should stop staring down the clock and sign this bill. https://t.co/Oeu2Ixy73J

This is what happens when Trump & Republicans prioritize billionaires over health care for Americans. 

Four million Americans who HAD health insurance are now without it. 

https://t.co/ojoWebdnAp

Counting every vote is the very foundation of our democracy. It gives each eligible American an equal say in who represents them, regardless of money or status. 

This is a win for the American people and our democratic system.

Joined #HarborGateway South Neighborhood Council’s Game Night!

Republicans need to work with @HouseDemocrats to

Republicans need to join @HouseDemocrats to restore clean energy funding and lower costs NOW. No American should have to risk their

Trump continues to abuse the power of the presidency. He’s using the DOJ to settle personal scores and go after his political “enemies” because they’ve stood up to his corruption and lawlessness.

Republicans want to go after waste, fraud, and abuse — they can start with the

Absolutely disgusting. There is no end to Trump and his ability to bring down the dignity of his office and the White House. 

One thing Trump and his grifters will never be able to buy: the class, grace, and integrity of Michelle Obama.

Almost half of all DACA recipients call California their home. They’re our neighbors, coworkers, family, and friends. 

As we celebrate the 14th anniversary of #DACA, it’s time to provide them with permanent protection and a pathway to citizenship. #HomeIsHere https://t.co/yhyk0Ud4XQ

Americans should be able to access their health records in real time to make the best decisions for their own health care. 

Providers need resources to make this happen — but they also need to be held in check to prevent unnecessary hurdles and financial gain from the process. https://t.co/UzOTlGN90z

Shoutout to our @HouseDemocrats and @SenateDemocrats who put on the uniform last night and gave it their all! https://t.co/oJ6g5KjWBf

The House voted NOT to extend Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act. This was a NO vote. 

Trump and his administration shouldn’t have unchecked power to spy on Americans, and the head of our intelligence agencies need to actually be qualified. https://t.co/tvwm2dwlAJ
Americans don’t love inflation because it means higher costs.

Republicans know Americans are tired of Trump’s failing policies that make life more expensive — so they’re trying to rig our maps and cheat us out of fair elections. 

@HouseDemocrats and Americans across the country are fighting back to protect our voting rights. https://t.co/PaZKSUcAXB

Republicans just gave $70 billion of YOUR hard earned tax dollars to ICE and Border Patrol. 

That money should be used to help Americans, NOT Trump’s mass deportation machine. https://t.co/LFXOI9CkFr
